headline: Invesco Equity And Income Fund Q1 2026 Portfolio Review
summary: We purchased a new holding in the consumer discretionary sector. We also eliminated several holdings, using the proceeds to fund investments we believe have better risk/reward profiles.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on KKR, Raises Price Target to $119
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Glenn Schorr   maintains KKR (NYSE:KKR) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $110 to $119.
